title: astragalus lotiflorus var. cretaceus
intro: Astragalus lotiflorus var. cretaceus, also known as Cretaceous milkvetch, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family, commonly found in dry, sandy areas. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are known for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cretaceous milkvetch include its potential to improve immune function, reduce inflammation, and enhance cardiovascular health, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. The herbal preparations of Astragalus lotiflorus var. cretaceus often involve drying and processing the roots or leaves into teas, capsules, or extracts for use in treating various health conditions.
